chapter_title.en: Chapter on What Has Been Reported Regarding Looking at Women

text: 4975 - وَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : "يَا أَيُّهَا اَلنَّاسُ إِنَّمَا اَلنَّظْرَةُ مِنَ اَلشَّيْطَانِ فَمَنْ وَجَدَ مِنْ ذَلِكَ شَيْئاً فَلْيَأْتِ أَهْلَهُ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4975 - The Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace be upon him and his family) said:
"O' people, indeed the (lustful) glance is from Satan. So whoever experiences something from that, let him go to his family."
